title: Leftover empty xUnit template test inflates test count
evidence: BrazilianSoccerMCP.Tests/UnitTest1.cs:5 — [Fact] Test1() has an empty body and no assertions; always passes vacuously
suggestion: Delete UnitTest1.cs; it verifies nothing and pads the reported 45-test total

title: Competition/season filters require exact diacritic form
evidence: DataRepository.cs:48 uses m.Competition.Equals(competition, OrdinalIgnoreCase) against stored 'Brasileirão'/'Copa do Brasil'; a caller passing 'Brasileirao' (no accent) gets zero results
suggestion: Normalize/strip diacritics on the competition filter as TeamNameNormalizer already does for team names

title: GetTopBrazilianPlayersAtBrazilianClubs hardcodes a club whitelist
evidence: PlayerQueryTools.cs:70 — a fixed 15-club array with fragile Split(' ')[0] substring matching rather than deriving clubs from the data
suggestion: Derive Brazilian clubs from the FIFA dataset (e.g. players whose Nationality=Brazil grouped by Club) instead of a static list

title: Extended dataset loaded then discarded
evidence: DataRepository.cs:29 loads extended matches into a local var but the comment notes it is kept 'separately'; _allMatches never includes it, so BR-Football-Dataset.csv rows are unused after loading
suggestion: Either drop the LoadExtendedMatches call from LoadAll or actually merge/expose the richer stats
